data.en: I went to the National Museum of China yesterday.
data.cn: 我昨天去了中国国家博物馆。
accept: Yesterday I went to the National Museum of China.

data.en: I saw an ancient dumpling from Xinjiang!
data.cn: 我看到了一个来自新疆的古代饺子！
accept: An ancient dumpling from Xinjiang I saw!

data.en: It looks just like dumplings today.
data.cn: 它看起来和今天的饺子一模一样。
accept: Just like dumplings today it looks.

data.en: What did ancient people put in it?
data.cn: 古代人在里面放了什么？

data.en: No one knows for sure.
data.cn: 没有人确切地知道。
accept: For sure no one knows.

data.en: The dumpling is from the Tang Dynasty.
data.cn: 这个饺子是唐朝的。
accept: From the Tang Dynasty the dumpling is.

data.en: People ate dumplings over 1,000 years ago!
data.cn: 一千多年前人们就吃饺子了！
accept: Over 1,000 years ago people ate dumplings!

data.en: How did dumplings come to Xinjiang?
data.cn: 饺子是怎么来到新疆的？

data.en: Xinjiang was an important place in China.
data.cn: 新疆是中国的一个重要地方。
accept: An important place in China was Xinjiang.

data.en: They brought dumplings to Xinjiang.
data.cn: 他们把饺子带到了新疆。
accept: To Xinjiang they brought dumplings.

data.en: People also found other food in Xinjiang.
data.cn: 人们在新疆也发现了其他的食物。
accept: In Xinjiang people also found other food.

data.en: What did they find?
data.cn: 他们发现了什么？

data.en: When did they find it?
data.cn: 他们什么时候发现它的？

data.en: It's also from the Tang Dynasty.
data.cn: 它也是唐朝的。
accept: From the Tang Dynasty it's also.

data.en: It's over 1,000 years old, too.
data.cn: 它也有一千多岁了。
accept: Too, it's over 1,000 years old.

data.en: How did it last so long?
data.cn: 它是怎么保存这么久的？

data.en: There's little rain in Xinjiang.
data.cn: 新疆几乎不下雨。
accept: In Xinjiang there's little rain.

data.en: Food can last a long time there.
data.cn: 食物在那里可以保存很长时间。
accept: There food can last a long time.

data.en: What did ancient people put in the mooncake?
data.cn: 古代人在月饼里放了什么？

data.en: We don't know because we can't open it!
data.cn: 我们不知道，因为我们打不开它！
accept: Because we can't open it we don't know!

data.en: Watches are so expensive.
data.cn: 手表太贵了。
accept: So expensive watches are.

data.en: Most people don't have one.
data.cn: 大多数人没有手表。
accept: One most people don't have.

data.en: This morning, I bought my very first watch.
data.cn: 今天早上，我买了我人生中的第一块手表。
accept: I bought my very first watch this morning.

data.en: From now on, I will always know the time!
data.cn: 从现在起，我将永远知道时间！
accept: I will always know the time from now on!

data.en: Yesterday, I bought a pair of glasses.
data.cn: 昨天，我买了一副眼镜。
accept: I bought a pair of glasses yesterday.

data.en: I put them on, then I took a boat to work.
data.cn: 我戴上它们，然后坐船去上班。
accept: Then I took a boat to work, I put them on.

data.en: I could see all the ships on the River Thames!
data.cn: 我能看到泰晤士河上所有的船！
accept: On the River Thames I could see all the ships!

data.en: The river was busy.
data.cn: 这条河很繁忙。
accept: Busy the river was.

data.en: A great fire started in London this morning!
data.cn: 今天早上伦敦发生了一场大火！
accept: This morning a great fire started in London!

data.en: The fire is now growing very quickly.
data.cn: 火现在蔓延得很快。
accept: Very quickly the fire is now growing.

data.en: People are pulling down houses in front of the fire to stop it.
data.cn: 人们正在火灾前拆掉房子以阻止火势蔓延。
accept: To stop it people are pulling down houses in front of the fire.

data.en: But it's still moving very fast.
data.cn: 但是它仍然移动得很快。
accept: But very fast it's still moving.

data.en: I dug a hole in my garden.
data.cn: 我在我的花园里挖了一个洞。
accept: In my garden I dug a hole.

data.en: I put some cheese from Italy into it!
data.cn: 我把一些来自意大利的奶酪放进去了！
accept: Into it I put some cheese from Italy!

data.en: I hope it is safe from the fire.
data.cn: 我希望它在火灾中安然无恙。
accept: Safe from the fire I hope it is.

data.en: She made a choice out of love.
data.cn: 她出于爱做出了选择。
accept: Out of love she made a choice.

data.en: To save the art on the walls,
data.cn: 为了拯救墙上的艺术，

data.en: She worked hard all her life long.
data.cn: 她一生都在努力工作。
accept: All her life long she worked hard.

data.en: Boys and girls, let's protect it.
data.cn: 孩子们，让我们保护它吧。
accept: Let's protect it, boys and girls.

data.en: So the world can enjoy it.
data.cn: 这样世界就能欣赏它了。
accept: Enjoy it the world can.

data.en: More and more people hear her voice.
data.cn: 越来越多的人听到了她的声音。
accept: Her voice more and more people hear.

data.en: There was sand all around.
data.cn: 四周都是沙子。
accept: All around there was sand.

data.en: Life was hard.
data.cn: 生活很艰辛。
accept: Hard life was.

data.en: The paintings of the Mogao Caves were so beautiful.
data.cn: 莫高窟的壁画太美了。
accept: So beautiful the paintings of the Mogao Caves were.

data.en: I wanted to protect them.
data.cn: 我想保护它们。
accept: To protect them I wanted.

data.en: Did you have any difficulties?
data.cn: 你有遇到什么困难吗？

data.en: Too many people visited the caves.
data.cn: 太多的人参观了洞穴。
accept: The caves too many people visited.

data.en: That's bad for the paintings.
data.cn: 那对壁画不利。
accept: For the paintings that's bad.

data.en: We took photos of the paintings.
data.cn: 我们给壁画拍了照片。
accept: Of the paintings we took photos.

data.en: Now people can see the paintings on computers.
data.cn: 现在人们可以在电脑上看到壁画。
accept: On computers people can see the paintings now.
